viewer.error.outsideWorkspace: File is outside the selected root.
run.error.MissingWorkspaceError.title: Workspace setup is incomplete.
run.error.MissingWorkspaceError.what: No workspace folder is available for the extension to run against.
run.error.MissingWorkspaceError.why: The LogParser commands need an open repository folder so they can resolve local files and the local CLI.
run.error.MissingWorkspaceError.nextStep: Open the repository root in VS Code and run the command again.
run.error.BinaryNotFoundError.title: A required executable is missing.
run.error.BinaryNotFoundError.what: The command launcher could not find the executable needed to start LogParser.
run.error.BinaryNotFoundError.why: The selected launch strategy points to a tool that is not installed or is not available from this environment.
run.error.BinaryNotFoundError.nextStep: Install the missing tool, fix `llmLogparser.pythonPath` or `llmLogparser.cliCommand`, and run the command again.
run.error.PermissionDeniedError.title: The command could not be started.
run.error.PermissionDeniedError.what: The operating system denied permission to execute the required command.
run.error.PermissionDeniedError.why: The executable exists, but it is not runnable with the current permissions or environment.
run.error.PermissionDeniedError.nextStep: Check executable permissions and the configured command path, then run the command again.
run.error.InvalidInputError.title: Some inputs or settings need attention.
run.error.InvalidInputError.what: The extension blocked the command before launch because the inputs or settings are not valid yet.
run.error.InvalidInputError.why: A required field, command setting, or workspace prerequisite is missing or malformed.
run.error.InvalidInputError.nextStep: Review the highlighted settings and inputs, fix them, and run the command again.
run.error.UnknownExecutionError.title: The command failed.
run.error.UnknownExecutionError.what: The LogParser command did not complete successfully.
run.error.UnknownExecutionError.why: The CLI started but returned a failure, or the extension received an unexpected execution error.
run.error.UnknownExecutionError.nextStep: Review the command output above, fix the reported issue, and run the command again.
run.error.unknown.what: The command failed for an unexpected reason.
run.error.unknown.why: The extension received an error it could not classify safely.
run.error.unknown.nextStep: Review the command output and settings, then try again.
